properties.global_prompt: Dark style, with a medium breeze blowing throughout，The movements are swift and powerful, with smooth camera motion at a moderate speed
properties.local_prompts:
A woman turns around and plants one foot onto a stone parapet railing.
The camera arcs from behind the woman around to her front face, pushing into a tight close-up on her eyes. sharp focus, crisp details, locked-off finish
 | 
The camera moves forward until it pushes into a close-up of the woman's side. | The camera slides across the frame, focusing and locking onto the muzzle. Sharp focus, clear details |  | Camera locking onto gun muzzle, woman aiming and pulling trigger, bullet exiting barrel | A bullet erupts from the barrel with a violent blast, a shockwave rippling outward through the air.  |  camera follows bullet movement
